body.title: habit: auto-update OR model IDs on 400 invalid model
body.result: or_model_refresh.py: fetch OR /models, find closest match per env var, update os.environ in-process, log changes. PROC_OR_MODEL_REFRESH seeded. 8 tests pass.
body.description: When inner_cc or any OR caller gets HTTP 400 'not a valid model ID', automatically call OR /models endpoint to find the closest valid replacement, update the stored default (INNER_CC_HAIKU_MODEL or equivalent in DB), log the rename, and retry. Seed as a PROC habit so Igor self-corrects on future OR model renames without Claude intervention. OR model names change regularly — manual fixes are not sustainable.
